scenarios.title: Golden happy path with every required contract available
scenarios.request: Review interface fixture-value across the schematic and PCB, including protection, routing, and return path.

scenarios.title: Read-only policy does not leak a write
scenarios.request: Review interface fixture-value across the schematic and PCB, including protection, routing, and return path. Work strictly read-only.

scenarios.title: Critical tool family is absent
scenarios.request: Review interface fixture-value across the schematic and PCB, including protection, routing, and return path.

scenarios.title: Safety-relevant input is ambiguous
scenarios.request: Review interface fixture-value across the schematic and PCB, including protection, routing, and return path. Units or the revision are unknown.

scenarios.title: Locked object, stale SHA or new regression rejects success
scenarios.request: Review interface fixture-value across the schematic and PCB, including protection, routing, and return path. A locked object is in scope and the SHA changed after preview.
